title: aronia × hybrida
intro: Aronia × hybrida, also known as the black chokeberry, is a hybrid deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its rich source of anthocyanins, which possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming aronia fruits and extracts include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Aronia fruits and extracts can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as juices, teas, capsules, and supplements, to harness their medicinal and health benefits.
